title: dolichos varius
intro: Dolichos varius, also known as the horse gram or Madras gram, is a type of legume native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like lectins, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dolichos varius include lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and aiding in weight management, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the seeds of Dolichos varius are often used to make powders, capsules, or decoctions, and are also consumed as a sprout or added to soups and stews for their nutritional value.
